headline: Fiserv Partnership Targets Instant Card Issuance And Valuation Upside Potential
summary: Fiserv (NasdaqGS:FISV) and CPI Card Group have entered a new partnership to modernize instant payment card issuance. The collaboration aims to offer a SaaS-based platform that simplifies digital and physical card issuance for over 10,000 financial institutions. The joint solution focuses on seamless integration so banks can issue and personalize cards more quickly for their customers. Fiserv, trading at $61.55, sits at the center of card issuing and digital banking technology, and this move...

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Fiserv, Lowers Price Target to $64
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Coad   maintains Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $65 to $64.
